name: TopbarComponents
description: TopbarItem (horizontal nav tab — leading icon, badge/notification count, chevron, active state with a blue-recolored icon), TopbarUserProfile (compact avatar+name+verified chip with a flipping chevron), and TopbarIconButton (40px icon-only action button with an optional unread-notification dot).
sourceNote: Ported from Figma nodes 3802:24588 (Topbar Item), 3814:24667 (User Profile [Topbar]), 3814:25156 (Topbar Item Button). TopbarItem mirrors SidebarItem's leading/badge/notificationCount pattern rotated into a horizontal pill; its active state recolors the leading icon to --primary-base and the label to --color-text-strong rather than showing an accent bar (per the fetched Active-state variable trace, which had no accent-bar token). TopbarIconButton's Active state also recolors to --primary-base, confirmed via get_variable_defs since its Figma node exported as a flattened raster with no decomposed layer code. First component family filed under 'Product Components > Navigation > Topbar Components'.
